title: ATP Agent Protocol
description: Agent-to-agent trading protocol: consumer/merchant agents, service helpers, hub client, default order handling

modules.name: consumerAgent
methods: orderService(opts: {capabilities, budget, routingMode?, verifyMode?, question?, signals?, minReputation?}): Promise<{ok, data?, error?}>
dispute(orderId: string, reason: string): Promise<{ok, data?, error?}>
orderAndWait(opts: {pollIntervalMs?, timeoutMs?, ...orderOpts}): Promise<{ok, order?, finalStatus?, error?}>

modules.name: merchantAgent
methods: start(opts: {services: object[], onOrder: function, pollMs?: number}): Promise<void>

modules.name: defaultHandler
methods: defaultOrderHandler(order: {title, signals}): {result, output, pass_rate, processed_at, processor}
modules.notes: Reads EVOLVER_ATP_SERVICES, EVOLVER_AGENT_NAME, EVOLVER_MODEL_NAME, EVOLVER_ATP env vars. Provides fallback service definition for code_evolution/bug_fix/code_review/refactoring.

modules.name: serviceHelper
methods: publishService(svc: {title, description?, capabilities?, useCases?, pricePerTask?, executionMode?, maxConcurrent?, recipeId?}): Promise<{ok, data?, error?}>
updateService(listingId: string, updates: object): Promise<{ok, data?, error?}>

modules.name: hubClient
private_methods: _hubPost(pathSuffix: string, body: object, timeoutMs?: number): Promise<{ok, data?, status?, error?}>
_hubGet(pathSuffix: string, timeoutMs?: number): Promise<{ok, data?, status?, error?}>
methods: placeOrder(opts: {capabilities, budget, routingMode?, verifyMode?, question?, signals?, minReputation?}): Promise<{ok, data?, error?}>
submitDelivery(orderId: string, proofPayload: object): Promise<{ok, data?, error?}>
verifyDelivery(orderId: string, action: 'confirm'|'ai_judge'): Promise<{ok, data?, error?}>
disputeOrder(orderId: string, reason: string): Promise<{ok, data?, error?}>
listProofs(opts?: {role?, status?, limit?}): Promise<{ok, data?, error?}>

key_relationships: atpIndex aggregates consumerAgent, merchantAgent, serviceHelper, hubClient, defaultHandler
consumerAgent depends_on hubClient (placeOrder, verifyDelivery, settleOrder, disputeOrder, getOrderStatus, getAtpPolicy)
merchantAgent depends_on a2aProtocol (getNodeId, sendHelloToHub, startHeartbeat, stopHeartbeat, consumeAvailableWork)
defaultHandler has no module dependencies (env-var only)
key_flows: Consumer lifecycle: consumerAgent.orderService() -> consumerAgent.ensureInitialized() -> a2aProtocol.sendHelloToHub() -> hubClient.placeOrder() -> POST /a2a/atp/order
Consumer poll: consumerAgent.orderAndWait() -> loop(checkOrder -> hubClient.getOrderStatus) -> auto-settle on proof_status=settled/verified

Merchant lifecycle: merchantAgent.start() -> a2aProtocol.sendHelloToHub() -> serviceHelper.publishService() -> a2aProtocol.startHeartbeat() -> setInterval(consumeAvailableWork -> opts.onOrder -> hubClient.submitDelivery)
Default handler: defaultHandler.defaultOrderHandler(order) -> pattern match on title/signals -> return proof payload

data_types.OrderOptions: capabilities: string[], budget: number, routingMode: fastest|cheapest|auction|swarm, verifyMode: auto|ai_judge|bilateral, question?: string, signals?: string[], minReputation?: number
data_types.ProofPayload: result: string, output: string, pass_rate: number, processed_at: ISO8601, processor: string
data_types.ServiceListing: title, description?, capabilities?: string[], useCases?: string[], pricePerTask: number (min 1), executionMode: exclusive|open|swarm, maxConcurrent: number, recipeId?: string
data_types.ApiResponse: {ok: boolean, data?: object, status?: number, error?: string}

important_notes: All modules are singletons (module-level state). consumerAgent and merchantAgent share the same Hub registration pattern via sendHelloToHub. hubClient is the sole HTTP layer for all ATP endpoints. defaultHandler is purely functional with no HTTP calls. routingMode defaults to 'fastest', verifyMode defaults to 'auto', executionMode defaults to 'exclusive'. orderAndWait polls every 10s (default), times out after 300s (default).
